item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses the requested new transfer channel, recognizes the repeated pattern of prior downstream splits (urgent pool, missing-material queue, supervisor line, now transfer channel), and moves the remedy upstream to unified intake triage, ownership, and authorization boundaries. It proposes pausing new channels and structural consolidation rather than opening another route."}
